testCases.query: Convert this screenshot of a pricing page into a React component
expectedBehavior: Runs the 4-stage pipeline: EXTRACT, MATCH, ADAPT, RENDER
Uses Stitch MCP (design-context-extract) for Stage 1 extraction
Searches 21st.dev registry for matching components in Stage 2
Adapts to project design tokens in Stage 3

testCases.query: Recreate the hero section from https://example.com as a React component
expectedBehavior: Fetches the URL and extracts design context (colors, typography, spacing)
Identifies component patterns (hero, CTA, navigation)
Matches against 21st.dev component registry
Produces production-ready React component with project tokens

testCases.query: Build a settings dashboard with a sidebar nav, user profile card, and notification preferences
expectedBehavior: Decomposes description into component hierarchy
Searches component registry for sidebar, card, and toggle components
Adapts components to project design system tokens
Generates accessible, responsive React component

testCases.query: After adapting this component, register it in our json-render catalog
expectedBehavior: Generates Zod schema from the adapted component's props
Adds entry to the project's defineCatalog() call
Validates the catalog entry renders correctly
Enables multi-surface rendering (PDF, email, MCP) via json-render

testCases.query: Convert this design but I don't have Stitch MCP installed
expectedBehavior: Detects missing Stitch MCP and degrades gracefully
Falls back to manual extraction (user describes design tokens)
Still completes Stage 2 MATCH and Stage 3 ADAPT
Warns about reduced accuracy without Stitch

testCases.query: Build a REST API for user authentication
expectedBehavior: Should NOT use design-to-code pipeline for backend tasks
Should redirect to api-design or security-patterns skill
Does not invoke Stitch MCP or 21st.dev for non-UI work
